front: Morar no exterior abre a mente para novas culturas.
pronunciation: moo-RAHR noo eyks-teh-ry-OHR AH-bree ah MEHN-chee PAH-rah NOH-vahs coow-TOO-rahs.
back: Living abroad opens the mind to new cultures.
context: Reflecting on global relocation benefits using 'morar no exterior'.

front: Eu fiz muitos bicos de limpeza enquanto morava na Austrália.
pronunciation: ew fees MOOI-toos BEE-koos jee leeym-PEH-zah eeyng-KWAHN-too moo-RAH-vah nah ows-TRAH-lyah.
back: I did a lot of cleaning gigs while I lived in Australia.
context: Describing flexible transitional work using the colloquial term 'bicos' (gigs/side jobs).

front: O processo de triagem da empresa exige atenção aos detalhes.
pronunciation: oo proo-SEHS-oo jee try-AH-zhehyng dah eeym-PREH-zah eh-ZHEE-zhee ah-tehn-SOHNG owz jee-TAH-lyees.
back: The company's screening process requires attention to detail.
context: Discussing background or application vetting using 'processo de triagem'.

front: Eu uso o inglês diariamente para comunicação profissional.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo oo eeyng-GLEHS jee-ah-ryah-MEHN-chee PAH-rah coo-moo-nee-kah-SOHNG proo-fee-syo-NAW.
back: I use English daily for professional communication.
context: Stating workplace language usage parameters via 'comunicação profissional'.

front: O contrato é para prestar serviços na sede da Vodafone.
pronunciation: oo coohn-TRAH-too eh PAH-rah prehs-TAHR sehr-VEE-soos nah SEH-jee dah Vodafone.
back: The contract is to provide services at the Vodafone headquarters.
context: Specifying corporate client placement frameworks using 'prestar serviços'.

front: Mudar de país requer uma grande capacidade de adaptação.
pronunciation: moo-DAHR jee pah-EES heh-KWEHR OO-mah GRAHN-jee kah-pah-see-DAH-jee jee ah-dahp-tah-SOHNG.
back: Moving countries requires a great capacity for adaptation.
context: Stating expatriate relocation challenges using 'mudar de país'.

front: A ISS é a empresa responsável pela contratação terceirizada.
pronunciation: ah ISS eh ah eeym-PREH-zah hehs-pohn-SAH-vew PEH-lah coohn-trah-tah-SOHNG tehr-say-ree-ZAH-dah.
back: ISS is the company responsible for the outsourced hiring.
context: Explaining corporate operational frameworks via 'contratação terceirizada'.

front: Eu passei pela verificação de antecedentes sem nenhum problema.
pronunciation: ew pah-SAY PEH-lah veh-ree-fee-kah-SOHNG jee ahn-teh-seh-DEHN-chees sayng nee-NYOONG proo-BLEH-mah.
back: I passed the background check without any problem.
context: Discussing international security clearances via 'verificação de antecedentes'.

front: Como funciona o custo de vida nessa nova cidade?
pronunciation: KOH-moo foon-syo-NAH oo COOS-too jee VEE-dah NEHS-ah NOH-vah see-DAH-jee?
back: How does the cost of living in this new city work?
context: Querying relocation financial metrics using 'custo de vida'.

front: Eu guardei boas lembranças do tempo em que trabalhei fora.
pronunciation: ew gwahr-DAY BOH-ahs lehyng-BRAHN-sahs doo TEHMP-oo ahyng kee trah-bah-LYAY FOH-rah.
back: I kept good memories of the time when I worked abroad.
context: Using 'trabalhar fora' to indicate international employment history.

front: Toda a documentação precisa ser traduzida e autenticada.
pronunciation: TOH-dah ah doo-koo-mehn-tah-SOHNG prah-SEE-zoo sayr trah-doo-ZEE-dah ee ow-tehyng-chee-KAH-dah.
back: All documentation needs to be translated and authenticated.
context: Describing formal compliance certificate workflows for cross-border moves.

front: Eu me sinto confortável em trabalhar em ambientes multiculturais.
pronunciation: ew mee SEHYN-chee coohn-foohr-TAH-vew ahyng trah-bah-LYAHR ahyng ahm-by-EHN-chees mool-chee-coow-too-RAYS.
back: I feel comfortable working in multicultural environments.
context: Praising diversity soft skill experiences using 'ambientes multiculturais'.

front: O choque cultural inicial é perfeitamente normal.
pronunciation: oo SHOH-kee coow-too-RAW ee-nee-SYAW eh pehr-fay-tah-MEHN-chee noohr-MAW.
back: The initial culture shock is perfectly normal.
context: Validating psychological adaptation phases via 'choque cultural'.

front: Nós estamos organizando a mudança com bastante antecedência.
pronunciation: nohs ees-TAH-moos oohr-gah-nee-ZAHN-doo ah moo-DAHN-sah koong bahs-TAHN-chee ahn-teh-seh-DEHYN-syah.
back: We are organizing the move well in advance.
context: Describing proactive relocation schedules via 'com bastante antecedência'.

front: Ela conseguiu validar o visto de trabalho esta semana.
pronunciation: EH-lah coohn-seh-GHEEW vah-lee-DAHR oo VEES-too jee trah-BAH-lyoo EHS-tah seh-MAH-nah.
back: She managed to validate her work visa this week.
context: Tracking immigration milestone approvals via 'visto de trabalho'.

front: O idioma nativo dela é o português, mas ela fala inglês bem.
pronunciation: oo ee-jee-OH-mah nah-CHEE-vo DEH-lah eh oo poor-too-GHEHS, mahs EH-lah FAH-lah eeyng-GLEHS bayyng.
back: Her native language is Portuguese, but she speaks English well.
context: Describing second-language proficiency vectors using 'idioma nativo'.

front: Eu lido muito bem com a burocracia internacional.
pronunciation: ew LEE-doo MOOI-too bayyng coong ah boo-roo-krah-SEE-ah eeyng-tehr-nah-syo-NAW.
back: I deal very well with international bureaucracy.
context: Showcasing administrative resilience handling relocation paperwork layouts.

front: A oportunidade surgiu por meio de uma agência de recrutamento.
pronunciation: ah oo-pohr-too-nee-DAH-jee soohr-ZHEEW poor MAY-oo jee OO-mah ah-ZHAYNS-yah jee heh-croo-tah-MEHN-too.
back: The opportunity arose through a recruitment agency.
context: Describing candidate sourcing pathways using 'agência de recrutamento'.

front: Morar perto do trabalho ajuda a economizar com transporte.
pronunciation: moo-RAHR PEHR-too doo trah-BAH-lyoo ah-ZHOO-dah ah ee-coo-noo-mee-ZAHR coong trahns-POHR-chee.
back: Living close to work helps save money on transportation.
context: Stating city layout choice optimizations using 'economizar com transporte'.

front: Eu precisei apresentar meu registro criminal limpo.
pronunciation: ew prah-see-ZAY ah-preh-zehn-TAHR mew heh-ZHEES-troo cree-mee-NAW LEEYM-poo.
back: I needed to present my clean criminal record.
context: Handling standard international corporate screening documents.

front: Nós alugamos um apartamento mobiliado temporariamente.
pronunciation: nohs ah-loo-GAH-moos oong ah-pahr-tah-MEHN-too moo-bee-LYY-ah-do tehm-poh-RAH-ryah-MEHN-chee.
back: We rented a furnished apartment temporarily.
context: Describing transient housing layouts using 'apartamento mobiliado'.

front: A experiência de trabalhar no exterior enriquece o currículo.
pronunciation: ah eyks-peh-ree-EHN-syah jee trah-bah-LYAHR noo eyks-teh-ry-OHR eeyng-hee-KEH-see oo coohr-HEE-koo.
back: The experience of working abroad enriches the resume.
context: Framing foreign job context history as a high-value career asset.

front: Eu prefiro resolver tudo por e-mail para deixar registrado.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo heh-zowl-VEHR TOO-doo poor e-mail PAH-rah day-SHAHR heh-zhees-TRAH-do.
back: I prefer to resolve everything via email to keep a record.
context: Advocating for auditable corporate track paths using 'deixar registrado'.

front: A integração social é o passo mais demorado da mudança.
pronunciation: ah eeyng-teh-grah-SOHNG soo-SYAW eh oo PAHS-oo mays jee-moo-RAH-do dah moo-DANH-sah.
back: Social integration is the slowest step of the move.
context: Reflecting on expatriate neighborhood community building timelines.

front: Eu recebi a confirmação da vaga ontem no final do dia.
pronunciation: ew heh-seh-BEE ah coohn-feer-mah-SOHNG dah VAH-gah OHN-teeyng noo fee-NAW doo JEE-ah.
back: I received the job confirmation yesterday at the end of the day.
context: Celebrating successful recruitment selections using 'confirmação da vaga'.

front: O fuso horário dificulta um pouco falar com a família.
pronunciation: oo FOO-zoo oo-RAH-ryoo jee-fee-COOW-tah oong POH-koo fah-LAHR coong ah fah-MEE-lyah.
back: The time zone makes it a bit difficult to talk to family.
context: Managing distant geographical timeline offsets using 'fuso horário'.

front: Eu fiz conexões profissionais valiosas enquanto viajava.
pronunciation: ew fees coohn-ehk-SOHNGS proo-fee-syo-NAYS vah-LYOH-zahs eeyng-KWAHN-too vy-ah-ZHAH-vah.
back: I made valuable professional connections while traveling.
context: Describing organic networking during physical location journeys.

front: A segurança e a qualidade de vida são nossas prioridades.
pronunciation: ah seh-goo-RAHN-sah ee ah kwah-lee-DAH-jee jee VEE-dah sohng NOHS-ahs pry-oo-ree-DAH-jees.
back: Safety and quality of life are our priorities.
context: Stating core motivation factors driving international migration actions.

front: Eu assinei o contrato digital e enviei os documentos.
pronunciation: ew ah-see-NAY oo coohn-TRAH-too jee-zhee-TAW ee eehn-vy-AY ooz doo-koo-mehn-toos.
back: I signed the digital contract and sent the documents.
context: Finalizing onboarding compliance setups via 'contrato digital'.

front: Adaptar-se a uma nova rotina leva algumas semanas.
pronunciation: ah-dahp-TAHR-see ah OO-mah NOH-vah hoo-CHEE-nah LEH-vah aw-GOO-mahs seh-MAH-nahs.
back: Adapting to a new routine takes a few weeks.
context: Estimating physiological and mental adjustment curves ('nova rotina').

front: A equipe local me recebeu de braços abertos.
pronunciation: ah ee-KEE-phee loo-CAW mee heh-seh-BEW jee BRAH-soos ah-BEHR-toos.
back: The local team welcomed me with open arms.
context: Using the idiomatic welcoming phrase 'de braços abertos' inside a team framework.

front: Eu guardei dinheiro para cobrir as despesas iniciais da viagem.
pronunciation: ew gwahr-DAY jee-NYAY-roo PAH-rah coo-BREER ahs dehs-PEH-zahs ee-nee-sy-AYS dah vy-AH-zhehyng.
back: I saved money to cover the initial travel expenses.
context: Describing financial asset buffers prepared for international logistics.

front: O sistema de transporte público aqui é incrivelmente eficiente.
pronunciation: oo sees-TEH-mah jee trahns-POHR-chee POO-blee-koo ah-KEE eh eeyng-cree-VEW-meehn-chee ee-fee-syEHN-chee.
back: The public transportation system here is incredibly efficient.
context: Praising neighborhood urban infrastructure quality metrics.

front: Eu sinto orgulho de ter enfrentado esse processo complexo.
pronunciation: ew SEEYN-too oohr-GOOL-yoo jee tayr eeyng-frehyng-TAH-do EHS-ee proo-SEHS-oo kohm-PLEHKS-oo.
back: I feel proud to have faced this complex process.
context: Celebrating structural administrative journey closures. Female speakers use 'orgulhosa'.

front: Pronto para começar essa nova etapa da vida profissional.
pronunciation: PROHN-too PAH-rah coo-meh-SAHR EHS-ah NOH-vah eh-TAH-pah dah VEE-dah proo-fee-syo-NAW.
back: Ready to start this new stage of professional life.
context: Declaring complete system readiness for upcoming job milestones. Female speakers use 'pronta'.
